query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.public_id,
  d.name,
  d.email,
  d.created_at,
  d.is_paid,
  d.payment_status,
  d.selected_plan,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN d.is_paid = true THEN 1 END) as pagos,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN d.is_paid = false THEN 1 END) as nao_pagos
FROM diagnostics d
GROUP BY d.id, d.public_id, d.name, d.email, d.created_at, d.is_paid, d.payment_status, d.selected_plan
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
